generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in standing strong for our country. But after seeing how other nations handle defense, I'm convinced we need a modern draft system. Our allies rely on conscription to maintain readiness - why shouldn't we? The threats we face today are too serious to leave preparedness to chance. A balanced system would ensure everyone contributes fairly to our national security. It's not about forcing service, but about shared responsibility in uncertain times. #NationalSecurity #SharedResponsibility
